{{Infobox character
| name = Yakir
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] is a sergeant.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] is a representative of [[Malachi]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] has command of the unit in the absence of [[Traveler]] [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Malachi]] hoped [[Yakir]] would keep [[Cormac]] in line.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
